title: juncus glaucus equisetosus
intro: Juncus glaucus equisetosus, also known as soft rush or Equisetum, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Traditionally, soft rush is prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in salves and ointments to topically apply its medicinal properties.
